title: taraxacum mutatum
intro: Taraxacum mutatum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is commonly found in Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Taraxacum mutatum include its ability to support liver function, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum mutatum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
